name: AgentCheck: A Reproduce-Intervene-Mitigate Workbench for LLM Agents over MCP

description: arXiv:2607.11098v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Tool-using LLM agents are mostly evaluated assuming all tools work. When a tool times out, returns a week-stale value, or has its description poisoned in deployment, the developer needs a controlled way to reproduce the failure, test a fix, and confirm the fix worked before deployment. We present AgentCheck, an open-source web workbench that tur...
author: Aritra Mazumder, Nusrat jahan Lia
